hero.description: Agency-level results at freelancer prices. You get a senior developer who designs, builds, and ships — no middlemen, no bloated invoices. Fast communication, pixel-perfect execution, and a website that actually converts.

services.label: What I offer
services.title:
Everything you need,
nothing you don't.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Custom-built websites and web applications — fast, accessible, and made to scale. No templates. Every line of code written for your specific needs.

items.title: UI / UX Design
items.description: Interfaces that people actually enjoy using. Clean visual hierarchy, thoughtful interactions, and a design language that sets you apart from the competition.

items.title: Performance & SEO
items.description: A beautiful website nobody can find is a wasted investment. I optimise for Core Web Vitals, structured data, and search visibility from day one.

items.title: Custom CMS
items.description: Your own content management system — tailored to how you actually work. No bloated platforms, no monthly SaaS fees. Full ownership of your content.

portfolio.label: Selected work
portfolio.title:
Real projects.
Real results.
portfolio.subtitle: Click any project to read the full case study.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We start with a deep dive into your goals, audience, and competition. I want to understand what makes your business unique before touching code.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Wireframes, visual design, and prototypes — we iterate until the design precisely matches your vision. No surprises during development.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Clean, maintainable code with a focus on performance and accessibility. Regular updates keep you informed without micromanagement.

steps.title: Launch & Beyond
steps.description: Deployment, monitoring, and post-launch support. Most clients stay with me long-term — because good websites evolve.

about.label: About me
about.title:
The freelancer
advantage.
about.intro1: I'm Peter Lehocky — a web developer based in Slovakia with 8+ years of experience building websites for clients across Europe.
about.intro2: When you hire an agency, you're paying for infrastructure, project managers, and overhead. When you work with me, every penny goes towards the actual work. You get the expertise of an agency with the agility and directness of a one-person studio.

advantages.title: You talk directly to me
advantages.description: No account managers relaying your feedback. No developers who never see the client. Every email, call, and decision goes through the person actually building your site.

advantages.title: Fast, with no compromises
advantages.description: Quick turnaround times without cutting corners on quality. I've built efficient workflows over 8+ years that let me move fast while still sweating every detail.

advantages.title: Obsessive attention to detail
advantages.description: The spacing between lines, the transition on hover, the meta description of every page — nothing is left to chance. Good enough is never good enough.

advantages.title: Long-term partnership
advantages.description: I don't disappear after launch. Most of my clients have been with me for years. I'm invested in your success because my reputation depends on it.

contact.title:
Let's build something
marvelous together.

cookies.title: We value your privacy
cookies.description: We use cookies to analyze website traffic and optimize your experience. You can choose which cookies to allow.
cookies.necessaryDesc: Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website (Google Analytics).
cookies.marketingDesc: Used to deliver relevant ads and measure campaign effectiveness (Meta Pixel).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for Be Marvelous Digital — how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in compliance with GDPR and Slovak law.
privacy.intro: Be Marvelous Digital ("we", "us", "our"), operated by Peter Lehocky, is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal data when you visit our website bemarvelousdigital.com (the "Website").

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.content:
The data controller responsible for your personal data is:

Peter Lehocky — Be Marvelous Digital
Email: hello@bemarvelousdigital.com

As the data controller, we determine the purposes and means of processing your personal data in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) — Regulation (EU) 2016/679 — and Act No. 18/2018 Coll. on the Protection of Personal Data of the Slovak Republic.

dataCollected.title: 2. Personal Data We Collect
dataCollected.content:
We collect the following personal data:

a) Contact form submissions — When you submit our contact form, we collect your: full name, email address, phone number (optional), and project description message.

b) Analytics data (with consent) — With your explicit consent, we collect anonymized usage data via Google Analytics, including: pages visited, time spent on pages, referral source, device type and browser, approximate geographic location (country/city level).

c) Marketing data (with consent) — With your explicit consent, Meta Pixel collects data about your interactions with our website to measure the effectiveness of our advertising campaigns on Meta platforms (Facebook, Instagram).

d) Technical data — Our hosting infrastructure automatically logs: IP address (anonymized), browser type and version, operating system, and date/time of access. This data is necessary for the secure operation of the Website.

purpose.title: 3. Purpose and Legal Basis for Processing
purpose.content:
We process your personal data for the following purposes:

Responding to contact form inquiries — Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — Performance of a contract or pre-contractual steps.

Website analytics (Google Analytics) — Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR — Your explicit consent.

Advertising measurement (Meta Pixel) — Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR — Your explicit consent.

Website security and operation — Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR — Legitimate interest.

Legal compliance — Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(c) GDPR — Legal obligation.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies
cookies.content:
Our website uses cookies — small text files stored on your device.

Necessary cookies are required for the website to function properly (e.g., cookie consent preferences). These do not require consent under Art. 5(3) of the ePrivacy Directive.

Analytics cookies (Google Analytics) are only set after you provide explicit consent. They help us understand how visitors use our website.

Marketing cookies (Meta Pixel) are only set after you provide explicit consent. They enable us to measure the effectiveness of advertising on Meta platforms.

You can change your cookie preferences at any time by clearing your browser cookies and revisiting our website.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.content:
We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary:

Contact form data: Up to 2 years after your last communication, or until you request deletion.

Analytics data: 14 months (Google Analytics default retention period).

Marketing data: As governed by Meta's data policies, up to 2 years.

Server logs: 30 days.

sharing.title: 6. Data Sharing and Transfers
sharing.content:
We may share your data with the following third parties:

Mailchimp (The Rocket Science Group LLC) — for processing contact form submissions. Mailchimp is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

Google LLC — for analytics services (Google Analytics). Google is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

Meta Platforms, Inc. — for advertising measurement (Meta Pixel). Meta is certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.

All third-party processors are bound by data processing agreements and operate in compliance with GDPR requirements. Where data is transferred outside the EEA, appropriate safeguards (Standard Contractual Clauses or adequacy decisions) are in place.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content:
Under the GDPR and Slovak Act No. 18/2018 Coll., you have the right to:

Access your personal data (Art. 15 GDPR)
Rectify inaccurate data (Art. 16 GDPR)
Erase your data — "right to be forgotten" (Art. 17 GDPR)
Restrict processing (Art. 18 GDPR)
Data portability (Art. 20 GDPR)
Object to processing (Art. 21 GDPR)
Withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing (Art. 7(3) GDPR)

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at hello@bemarvelousdigital.com. We will respond within 30 days.

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the Slovak supervisory authority:

Úrad na ochranu osobných údajov Slovenskej republiky (Office for Personal Data Protection of the Slovak Republic)
Hraničná 12, 820 07 Bratislava 27
Website: dataprotection.gov.sk

security.title: 8. Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data, including: HTTPS encryption for all data in transit, secure hosting infrastructure, access controls limiting data access to authorized personnel only, and regular security updates.

children.title: 9. Children's Privacy
children.content: Our Website is not directed at children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected such data, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated version will be indicated by the "Last updated" date at the top. We encourage you to review this page periodically.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.content:
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, contact us at:

Peter Lehocky — Be Marvelous Digital
Email: hello@bemarvelousdigital.com
